zh.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Davenport是Sir Thomas Davenport和Agnes de Macclesfield的兒子，出生在英國爾。他和Elizabeth至少有1個兒子。他去世在英國爾維頓。

zh-hans.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Davenport是Sir Thomas Davenport和Agnes de Macclesfield的儿子，出生在英国爾。他和Elizabeth至少有1个儿子。他去世在英国爾維頓。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Davenport was born in Cheshire, England as the son of Sir Thomas Davenport and Agnes de Macclesfield. He had at least 1 son with Elizabeth. He died in Withington, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Davenport est né à Cheshire, Angleterre, fils de Sir Thomas Davenport et Agnes de Macclesfield. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Elizabeth. Il est décédé à Withington, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Davenport wurde in Cheshire, England, als Sohn von Sir Thomas Davenport und Agnes de Macclesfield geboren. Er hatte mit Elizabeth mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in Withington, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Davenport è nato il nel Cheshire, England come figlio di Sir Thomas Davenport e Agnes de Macclesfield. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Elizabeth. Morì nel Withington, Cheshire, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Davenport(은)는 영국 체실르에서 Sir Thomas Davenport(와)과 Agnes de Macclesfield의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Elizabeth(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 체실르 위스잉턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Davenport nasceu em Cheshire, Inglaterra filho de Sir Thomas Davenport e Agnes de Macclesfield. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Elizabeth. Ele faleceu em Withington, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Davenport родился в местности чешир, Англия. Его родителей звали Sir Thomas Davenport и Agnes de Macclesfield. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Elizabeth. Он умер в местности витингтон, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Davenport nació en Cheshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Sir Thomas Davenport y Agnes de Macclesfield. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Elizabeth. Murió en Withington, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
